description_for_human: 200+ free utility API tools — QR codes, passwords, UUIDs, hashing, Base64, lorem ipsum, JSON formatting, color conversion, email verification, IP geolocation, and timestamp conversion. No signup needed.
description_for_model: GadgetHumans API Hub provides 200+ utility API tools for AI agents. Use this plugin to generate QR codes, create secure passwords, generate UUIDs, hash text with MD5/SHA1/SHA256/SHA512, encode/decode Base64, generate lorem ipsum placeholder text, prettify/validate/minify JSON, convert colors between hex and RGB, verify email addresses, geolocate IP addresses, and convert timestamps. All endpoints are free (100 req/day) with Pro at $5/mo. Uses simple GET requests with query parameters. Returns JSON responses.

brand.name: GadgetHumans
brand.tagline: 200+ Free API Tools for AI Agents

tools.name: generate_qr_code
tools.description: Generate QR codes from text/URL. Supports PNG, SVG, GIF. Configurable size, color, error correction.

tools.name: generate_password
tools.description: Generate secure random passwords with configurable length and character sets.

tools.name: generate_uuid
tools.description: Generate UUID v4 identifiers. Supports batch (1-100) and multiple formats.

tools.name: hash_text
tools.description: Generate cryptographic hashes: MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512.

tools.name: encode_base64
tools.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text.

tools.name: generate_lorem_ipsum
tools.description: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text for mockups.

tools.name: process_json
tools.description: Prettify, validate, or minify JSON strings.

tools.name: convert_color
tools.description: Convert colors between hex (#FF0000) and RGB formats.

tools.name: verify_email
tools.description: Verify email address validity and deliverability.

tools.name: geolocate_ip
tools.description: Get geolocation data for any IP address.

tools.name: convert_timestamp
tools.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and date strings.
